description: A loading spinner appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' after the user clicked continue on the previous screen.
frame_description: Loading overlay visible on the baggage selection page.

description: The page navigates from the baggage results to the passenger details entry page.
frame_description: URL changes and the 'Travellers' page content loads, showing form fields for passenger information.

description: User pauses on the Travellers page, likely reading the 'Heads up!' warning message regarding personal details.
frame_description: The Travellers page is fully loaded and the user is examining the content.

description: User switches browser tabs to the Askable session page in response to a prompt.
frame_description: The active tab changes to the Askable session interface.
